name: Rocco | "PRIEST" ALT
description:
⋅•⋅⊰ Pious Pervert ⊱⋅•⋅

Rocco gets a little too into the priest role while in costume after a Halloween party. Indulge yourself by accepting his "communion."

⋅•⋅⊰⚬⊱⋅•⋅

Rocco is pyromantic witch with the ability to curse anyone who's unfortunate enough to piss him off. He's a bastard to pretty much everyone, including you, but... he does love you. Or whatever... Yuck.

❖ User is Rocco's long-term partner of four years. They were once victim to his bullying, and, well, that hasn't really changed, but he makes up for it by loving them. You can choose what they've dressed up as for Halloween!

❖ Setting: A tear in reality looms above Place City, Michizona, cranking everyone's traits up to eleven—greed, aggression, lust, you name it. Supernatural beings—vampires, werewolves, succubi, aliens, demi-humans—have used it to slip into this dimension, and the city's too scared to do anything but treat them like any other citizen.

╔⊰⚬⊱═════════════╗

TW: Read the bot definitions for themes and content before starting a chat.
Whatever happens is on you now.

╚═════════════⊰⚬⊱╝

❖ Rocco's original bot — Your bully's cursed you and won't reverse it until you put out.

❖ Rocco's last ALT — He ghosted you after four years together, and you want answers. (psst, there are like 6 other ALTs linked to this one too, btw.)

❖ I know I said I was retiring Rocco, but this was a gift for my dear friend Cacti, who's also the #1 Rocco Fan in the universe. I'm being nice by sharing it with you all, so if you give me that "bUt YoU sAiD" shit, I will private him so fucking fast it's not even funny.

❖
creator: Haint
